Footer.description: Building the future of Web3 on Solana. Agentic Engineering. Blockchain First.

AboutPage.description: VAIIYA is a creative studio at the intersection of AI, blockchain, and culture. We don't just write code; we curate experiences through Agentic Engineering.
AboutPage.whatIsP1: Agentic Engineering represents a paradigm shift in software development. Coined by Andrej Karpathy, it's the practice of using advanced AI to bridge the gap between human intent and machine execution.
AboutPage.whatIsP2: At VAIIYA, we've embraced this fully. We act as creative directors, guiding powerful AI agents to manifest complex decentralized applications at the speed of thought. This isn't just about efficiency; it's about maintaining a higher level of creative flow—the 'vibe'—throughout the entire building process.
AboutPage.speedDesc: 400ms block times mean your users never have to wait. Real-time interaction for real-world impact.
AboutPage.costDesc: Fraction-of-a-cent fees make Web3 accessible to everyone, enabling mass-adoption use cases.
AboutPage.ecoDesc: A thriving community of builders and innovators pushing the boundaries of what's possible on-chain.
AboutPage.visionQuote: "We believe the future of software isn't just about functional utility, but about how it makes you feel. By combining AI-augmented development with strong product intuition, we create Web3 tools that feel like magic."
AboutPage.ctaDesc: Explore our products or reach out to see how we can bring your Web3 vision to life.

VynderPage.description: The first Web3-native dating experience. Your wallet is your identity. Your interactions are your legacy. No app stores. No borders. Just connections.
VynderPage.cardDesc: Passionate about Web3 and long hikes. Let's build something cool.
VynderPage.feat1Desc: No passwords or emails. Connect your Solana wallet and step into a world of verified interactions.
VynderPage.feat2Desc: Available on any platform instantly. Vynder bypasses traditional gatekeepers to prioritize user privacy and freedom.
VynderPage.feat3Desc: Built using the core principles of Agentic Engineering—optimized for flow, connection, and long-term ecosystem health.
VynderPage.quote: "In a world of bots and noise, Vynder uses the blockchain to foster genuine, high-vibe human connection."
VynderPage.ctaDesc: Join our private beta and be among the first to experience the future of Web3 social interaction.

NightStudioPage.description: NIGHTSTUDIO is a elite social layer for creators who value ownership. Gate your content, build your community, and receive direct Solana payouts without the middleman.
NightStudioPage.gatedDesc: Sophisticated content-gating tools allow you to monetize your influence on your own terms.
NightStudioPage.directDesc: Payments are processed instantly on Solana, ensuring 400ms finality from fan to creator.
NightStudioPage.deepDesc: Build meaningful relationships through a platform that prioritizes human interaction over algorithms.
NightStudioPage.philosophyQuote: "At NIGHTSTUDIO, we believe that premium software shouldn't just function—it should inspire. By merging elite design with Solana's power, we're setting a new standard for Web3 tools."
NightStudioPage.ctaDesc: Step into a more refined social ecosystem. Whether you're a creator or a connoisseur, there's a place for you in the night.

BlobioPage.description: BLOBIO is the ultimate blob battle experience. Grow your blob, dominate the arena, and receive direct Solana payouts.
BlobioPage.gatedDesc: Sophisticated gaming tools allow you to monetize your influence on your own terms.
BlobioPage.directDesc: Payments are processed instantly on Solana, ensuring 400ms finality.
BlobioPage.deepDesc: Build meaningful relationships through a platform that prioritizes human interaction over algorithms.
BlobioPage.philosophyQuote: "At BLOBIO, we believe that premium software shouldn't just function—it should inspire."
BlobioPage.ctaDesc: Step into a more refined gaming ecosystem.

FynderProjectPage.description: FYNDER is the next generation of social connection on Android. Built for speed, privacy, and genuine high-vibe interactions. No noise, just meaningful matches.
FynderProjectPage.feat1Desc: Butter-smooth Android experience. Optimized for performance so you can focus on finding the right connection.
FynderProjectPage.feat2Desc: Secure, encrypted, and respectful. Your data stays yours while you explore new possibilities.
FynderProjectPage.feat3Desc: Our agentic algorithms learn your preferences to surface the highest-vibe matches for you.
FynderProjectPage.philosophyTitle: Dating, Reimagined for the Modern Era.
FynderProjectPage.philosophyP1: FYNDER was built to solve the frustration of modern dating apps. We've stripped away the predatory mechanics and focused on what matters: real people making real connections.
FynderProjectPage.philosophyP2: Leveraging VAIIYA's Agentic Engineering, FYNDER provides a seamless experience that feels less like a tool and more like a bridge to your next great story.
FynderProjectPage.ctaDesc: Join thousands of others who are already discovering a better way to connect on Android.

GamesPage.title: Games
GamesPage.description: Dive into our collection of high-vibe games. From arcade classics to innovative Web3 experiences, we build for fun and engagement.
GamesPage.klappyDesc: A challenging bird-flight adventure. How far can you go?

AppsPage.title: Apps
AppsPage.description: Discover our suite of powerful applications designed for the modern Web3 era and beyond.
